goal: Keep image and video generation behind a structured SOP brief so media tools consume reviewed prompts and all Feishu cards remain on the shared runtime gateway.

acceptance_criteria.description: Router metadata marks copy plus image/video requests as mixed content and records material status.
Harness content SOP validation fails when generated results omit image prompt, video script, source citations, or review checklist.
Feishu media generation cards continue to pass the card runtime gateway health gate.
Media generation produces a structured record with rollback hint, engine, status, structured prompt, and output reference.
LLM router, GPT Image, and Dreamina runtime paths finalize with media_generation cards and media generation records.
